prompt: A romantic high-fashion travel campaign image set in a sunlit Spanish coastal village at golden hour, viewed down a narrow cobblestone stair street descending toward the sea. Whitewashed Mediterranean houses line both sides of the alley, with textured stucco walls, terracotta roof tiles, black wrought-iron balconies, wall-mounted lanterns, and many potted plants and flowers. On the right side, show 2 wrought-iron balconies, 2 wall lanterns, 1 vivid deep-blue door, and at least 8 terracotta pots with green plants mounted or placed along the facade. On the left edge, frame the scene with bright pink bougainvillea blossoms in the foreground. In the distance, the calm ocean reflects the warm sunset, with a rocky coastline and glowing horizon under a soft peach-and-gold sky. In the lower middle of the street, place 1 couple walking away hand in hand: a woman in a flowing light summer dress and a man in a pale shirt and shorts, small in scale to emphasize the environment. Composition is vertical editorial poster style, luxurious, serene, cinematic, aspirational, with warm golden sunlight casting long shadows and making the white walls glow. Add elegant overlay typography on the upper left in a refined serif font, warm brown color: the large line reads España,, below it in italic serif reads siempre en mi corazón., with a thin ornamental flourish beneath the text. Include a subtle white Pollo.ai logo in the upper right corner. Ultra-detailed, photorealistic, premium tourism advertising aesthetic, soft atmospheric haze, natural depth, magazine-cover quality.
